title: pharus micranthus var. discolor
intro: Pharus micranthus var. discolor, also known as the small-flowered pharus, is a type of plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating respiratory issues due to its antispasmodic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Pharus micranthus var. discolor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
